---
applyTo: "uo-modernuo-agent-plugin/**,AGENTS.md,CLAUDE.md,.cursor/rules/**,.github/**"
---

# UO ModernUO Agent Plugin Files

- Keep the plugin name `uo-modernuo-agent-plugin` stable.
- Keep guidance specific to Ultima Online and ModernUO, but not specific to any single shard.
- Keep shared instructions in `AGENTS.md`; use tool-specific files only for loading mechanics or surface-specific notes.
- Keep the Codex plugin manifest valid for the local validator.
- Keep Claude plugin metadata aligned with the Codex manifest for shared identity fields.
- Keep this v1 structure free of marketplace, MCP, hook, app, logo, screenshot, and placeholder asset files unless a task explicitly asks for them.
